subcodes.first_line: The Promise hath been fulfilled, and He Who was promised speaketh forth before (...), yet the people do deny. The All-Merciful hath come [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد اتی الوعد و الموعود ینطق امام (...) ولکن القوم هم ینکرون قد اتی الرحمن من
subcodes.subjects: @Manifestation of God speaking in the voice of Divinity, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @praise and encouragement, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
